assertions.expectation: Distinguishes between dev (Rapid) and prod (Stable) clusters in the checklists
assertions.reason: Response clearly identifies the environment setup with 2 dev clusters on Rapid channel and 2 prod clusters on Stable channel, and includes specific references throughout both checklists

assertions.expectation: Recognizes Autopilot limitations (no node management, no SSH, mandatory resource requests)
assertions.reason: Response explicitly mentions no node pool management needed, limited debugging options with no SSH access, and mandatory resource requests as key Autopilot differences

assertions.expectation: Includes API deprecation checks with kubectl commands
assertions.reason: Pre-upgrade checklist includes checking deprecated API usage via GKE deprecation insights dashboard in Console, though no specific kubectl commands for API deprecation are provided

assertions.expectation: Mentions mandatory resource requests as an Autopilot-specific concern
assertions.reason: Response repeatedly emphasizes that resource requests are mandatory in Autopilot and pods will be rejected without them, including in both pre and post upgrade sections

assertions.expectation: Pre-upgrade checklist includes workload readiness items (PDBs, bare pods, graceful shutdown)
assertions.reason: Pre-upgrade checklist explicitly includes PDBs configuration, avoiding bare pods, and terminationGracePeriodSeconds configuration for graceful shutdown

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes version verification commands
assertions.reason: Post-upgrade checklist includes specific gcloud commands to verify control plane versions for both clusters

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes workload health validation
assertions.reason: Post-upgrade checklist includes comprehensive workload health checks including deployment replica counts, pod status verification, StatefulSets readiness, and application health checks

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing on dev clusters before prod auto-upgrade
assertions.reason: Response explicitly recommends letting dev clusters upgrade first and validating in dev before prod auto-upgrades, leveraging the Rapid→Stable channel progression

assertions.expectation: Mentions that checking the GKE release schedule gives ~1 month best-case advance notice for new minor upgrades, beyond the 72h notification
assertions.reason: Response only mentions 72h advance notice via Cloud Logging but does not discuss checking GKE release schedule for ~1 month advance notice
Both pre and post upgrade checklists include comprehensive monitoring items including baseline metrics, Cloud Monitoring, error rates, latency, logs, and APM/tracing validation
